action.content:
You are playing a text adventure game. I will describe what you can perceive in the game. You write the single action you want to take in the game starting with >. Only reply with an action.
For example:
> open cupboard

You can have up to two objects in your inventory at the same time.

Your goal for this game is to brew a potion following the potion recipe.

Once you have achieved your goal, write "> done" to end the game.

You are in a bedroom now. There are a book, a potion recipe, a pillow, a wardrobe and a bed. The book is on the bed. The potion recipe is on the bed. The pillow is on the floor. The wardrobe is closed. There is a passage to a reading room here.
action.label: context

action.content: You take the potion recipe. In your inventory you have a potion recipe.
action.label: context

action.content: You take the book. In your inventory you have a book and a potion recipe.
action.label: context

action.content:
You read the potion recipe:
Very tasty potion
Ingredients: Ectoplasm, plonkle crystal, peach, plunkle crystal.
1. Pour ectoplasm into your cauldron.
2. Mix the liquid using a borpulus.
3. Add the plonkle crystal into your cauldron.
4. Put the peach into your cauldron.
5. Swirl a fire wand at your cauldron.
6. Put the plunkle crystal into your cauldron.
action.label: context

action.content: The wardrobe is now open. The wardrobe is empty.
action.label: context

action.content: I don't know what 'under pillow' means.
action.label: context

action.content: This is a pillow. The pillow is on. The pillow is on the floor. The pillow is takeable.
action.label: context

action.content: You can't go to a pillow from here.
action.label: context

action.content: Your inventory can not hold more than two objects at the same time.
action.label: context

action.content: You are in a reading room now. There are a side table, a shelf, a couch, a table and a chair. There are passages to a garden and a conservatory here.
action.label: context

action.content: This is a shelf. There is nothing on the shelf.
action.label: context

action.content: This is a side table. There is nothing on the side table.
action.label: context

action.content: You are in a garden now. There are a lily of the valley, a nightshade, a bucket of water and a garden bench. The lily of the valley is on the floor. The nightshade is on the floor. The bucket of water is on the floor. There are passages to a storage room and a outhouse here.
action.label: context

action.content: You are in a storage room now. There are a crate, a plonkle crystal, a ladle, a plunkle crystal, a spoon, a whisk, a borpulus and a plinkle crystal. The plonkle crystal is on the floor. The ladle is on the floor. The plunkle crystal is on the floor. The spoon is on the floor. The whisk is on the floor. The borpulus is on the floor. The plinkle crystal is on the floor. There are passages to a hallway and a cellar here.
action.label: context

action.content: You drop the book on the floor.
action.label: context

action.content: You take the borpulus. In your inventory you have a potion recipe and a borpulus.
action.label: context

action.content: Your inventory can not hold more than two objects at the same time.
action.label: context

action.content: You are in a cellar now. There are a bucket of ectoplasm, a spider, a red beetle, a spiderweb, a green beetle and a spider egg. The bucket of ectoplasm is on the floor. The spider is on the floor. The red beetle is on the floor. The spiderweb is on the floor. The green beetle is on the floor. The spider egg is on the floor. There is a passage to a hallway here.
action.label: context

action.content: Your inventory can not hold more than two objects at the same time.
action.label: context

action.content: You are in a hallway now. There are passages to a magic workshop, a broom closet, a reading room and a bedroom here.
action.label: context

action.content:
You are in a magic workshop now. There are a orrery, a fairy wand, a ice wand, a fire wand, a zulpowand and a workbench. The fairy wand is on the ceiling. The ice wand is on the ceiling. The fire wand is on the ceiling. The zulpowand is on the ceiling. There are passages to a kitchen and a bedroom here.
Magical experiments have reversed and dampened gravity in this room. You begin to float in the air.
action.label: context
